articles.title: CDA monitoring rise in Covid-19 cases, says periodic waves expected throughout the year
articles.summary:
📰 코로나, 기술 관련 뉴스
📢 CDA monitoring rise in Covid-19 cases, says periodic waves expected throughout t...
articles.content: "The public acute hospitals are able to manage the increase in cases," said the agency. Covid-19 is an endemic respiratory disease and periodic waves can be expected throughout the year. The rise in cases can be attributed to multiple factors including waning population immunity. At the same time, current vaccines available remain effective...
